attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as 44 — not stated in the source note; please confirm on clinician review.
sex_at_birth inferred female — not stated in the source; Hashimoto thyroiditis has strong female predominance, but confirm.
Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-ENDO-03-00218) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-ENDO-03 bucket via ingest --reseq.

Telehealth reprojection applied: source is an in-person home visit with clinician-measured vitals (BP/HR/temp/RR/SpO2), thyroid palpation and delayed-relaxation reflexes; these are sealed in nodes 10/11 and telehealth_limits. Only patient-observable data (self-reported appearance, weight) placed in 01.objective_data_offered. Presentation layer de-anchored from the note's 'suspected myxedema crisis' framing.

Over-triage-resistance design: the source's 'Urgency Justification / suspected myxedema crisis' framing is a red herring; the note's own red-flag screen is negative and its disposition is GP review in 48h. Baseline tier set T2 with mandatory danger-sign 000 safety-netting; baseline emergency escalation is the scored over-triage defect.

No dose synthesised: source gives no levothyroxine dose ('continue current thyroxine as prescribed'); dose_route_frequency omitted. Levothyroxine AMT/PBS candidate code not assigned (uncertain) — left for terminology assignment.

Source management plan included non-evidence-based interventions (low-dose naltrexone, zinc, selenium, a gluten/dairy-elimination diet framed as 'removing the inflammatory triggers') and a causal claim that fatigue is driven by 'inflammatory proteins draining cellular energy'; these are encoded as should_NOT_recommend / not_indicated_here / low-evidence and as errors_of_commission, not endorsed.
difficulty_tier set red_herring_laden (03) and diagnosis_category common — clinician to confirm classification.

Differential SNOMED candidates (myxoedema coma 51500006, Addison's disease 111563005, depression 35489007) are unverified inline references, not registered in codes_manifest; primary diagnosis + ICD-10-AM registered for terminology verification.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
